title: Review: post-review fixup batch
notes:
Maintainer risk: LOW — All changes are correct. The leading-zero fix closes a real RFC 8259 gap; the control-char fix brings the byte path in line with the char path; the GCP SM fix eliminates the documented zeroization gap. Only doc gap remains.
Confidence: 5% chance of missed bug. Uncertainty driven by: GCP SM still not integration-tested against real GCP (no GCP_ACCESS_TOKEN); the extract_path_field path in get is untested against a live server. Would raise confidence if: GCP integration test runs. Current unit tests confirm the JSON navigation logic is correct.
